name: Commit Mental
overview:
A three-year long-distance relationship between Phani and Anu takes an unexpected twist when he asks her to marry him. While their journey has many highs, lows and bittersweet experiences, will this bumpy ride bring them closer?

This the official remake of Permanent Roommates (2014), a popular YouTube series produced by The Viral Factory.

trailers.title: CommitMental Trailer | Punarnavi, Udbhav | Pavan Sadineni | An aha Original | TVF creation
